title: How can i make an automated line graph to show progression
excerpt: How can I create a line graph that dynamically tracks the progression over time, specifically based on the completion percentage of Key Results (KR) on my OKR board? The graph should update weekly to reflect the evolving…

posts.author: Ben.felt (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I create a line graph that dynamically tracks the progression over time, specifically based on the completion percentage of Key Results (KR) on my OKR board? The graph should update weekly to reflect the evolving KR completion percentages, providing a visual representation of the progress made over time. I would appreciate any suggestions or ideas on how to accomplish this.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Ben.felt

I suggest taking a look at the Analytics & Reports by Screenful. It’s an add-on to Monday that allows creating advanced charts, including line charts. Here’s an example line chart:

Charts+Screenshot+11578×960 124 KB

You can learn more about the add-on and signup for a free trial to give it a try!
